issue.message: Consider using `apply()` instead; `commit` writes its data to persistent storage immediately, whereas `apply` will handle it in the background
Consider using `apply()` instead; `commit` writes its data to persistent storage immediately, whereas `apply` will handle it in the background

Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.

Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toUpperCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.

Use of `REQUEST_IGNORE_BATTERY_OPTIMIZATIONS` violates the Play Store Content Policy regarding acceptable use cases, as described in https://developer.android.com/training/monitoring-device-state/doze-standby.html

Use of `REQUEST_IGNORE_BATTERY_OPTIMIZATIONS` violates the Play Store Content Policy regarding acceptable use cases, as described in https://developer.android.com/training/monitoring-device-state/doze-standby.html

`adbUiUpdateReceiver` is missing `RECEIVER_EXPORTED` or `RECEIVER_NOT_EXPORTED` flag for unprotected broadcasts registered for org.iiab.controller.ADB_PAIRING_SUCCESSFUL, org.iiab.controller.ADB_PAIRING_FAILED, org.iiab.controller.ADB_PAIRING_SENT, org.iiab.controller.ADB_CPU_UPDATE, org.iiab.controller.ADB_RESTRICTIONS_UPDATE
`downloadReceiver` is missing `RECEIVER_EXPORTED` or `RECEIVER_NOT_EXPORTED` flag for unprotected broadcasts registered for android.intent.action.DOWNLOAD_COMPLETE
Expecting `android:screenOrientation="unspecified"` or `"fullSensor"` for this activity so the user can use the application in any orientation and provide a great experience on Chrome OS devices
Should not restrict activity to fixed orientation. This may not be suitable for different form factors, causing the app to be letterboxed.
Avoid using "`px`" as units; use "`dp`" instead
Avoid using "`px`" as units; use "`dp`" instead
Avoid using "`px`" as units; use "`dp`" instead
Avoid using "`px`" as units; use "`dp`" instead
Avoid using "`px`" as units; use "`dp`" instead
Avoid using "`px`" as units; use "`dp`" instead

The intent action `org.iiab.controller.LOG_MESSAGE (used to send a broadcast)` matches the intent filter of a non-exported receiver, registered via a call to `Context.registerReceiver`, or similar. If you are trying to invoke this specific receiver via the action then you should use `Intent.setPackage(<APPLICATION_ID>)`.
Using `setJavaScriptEnabled` can introduce XSS vulnerabilities into your application, review carefully
`checkClientTrusted` is empty, which could cause insecure network traffic due to trusting arbitrary TLS/SSL certificates presented by peers
`checkServerTrusted` is empty, which could cause insecure network traffic due to trusting arbitrary TLS/SSL certificates presented by peers

Provide a timeout when requesting a wakelock with `PowerManager.Wakelock.acquire(long timeout)`. This will ensure the OS will cleanup any wakelocks that last longer than you intend, and will save your user's battery.
This tag and its children can be replaced by one `<TextView/>` and a compound drawable
Very long vector path (2212 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
Very long vector path (902 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
Very long vector path (857 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
Unconditional layout inflation from view adapter: Should use View Holder pattern (use recycled view passed into this method as the second parameter) for smoother scrolling
Set `android:baselineAligned="false"` on this element for better performance
Nested weights are bad for performance

issue.errorLine1: <string name="vpn_permission_granted">VPN अनुमति दी गई। कनेक्ट हो रहा है...</string>
<string name="auth_success_disconnect">प्रमाणीकरण सफल। डिस्कनेक्ट हो रहा है...</string>
<string name="download_description">नया संस्करण डाउनलोड हो रहा है...</string>
<string name="ota_toast_checking">अपडेट की जांच की जा रही है...</string>
<string name="install_msg_fetching_backups">बैकअप प्राप्त किए जा रहे हैं...</string>
<string name="install_status_extracting">Extraction du système...\n(Cela prendra un certain temps)</string>
<string name="install_status_extracting">सिस्टम निकाला जा रहा है...\n(इसमें कुछ समय लगेगा)</string>
<string name="install_status_deleting">नेटिव निष्कासन शुरू किया जा रहा है...</string>
<string name="install_status_indexing_zim">ZIM इंडेक्स किया जा रहा है...</string>
<string name="install_status_starting_vanilla">Démarrage de la réinitialisation vers Debian Vanilla...</string>
<string name="install_status_wiping_old">पुराना सिस्टम मिटाया जा रहा है...</string>
<string name="install_status_starting_vanilla">Vanilla Debian रीसेट शुरू किया जा रहा है...</string>
<string name="install_status_bootstrapping">IIAB बूटस्ट्रैप किया जा रहा है...</string>
<string name="install_msg_creating_backup">Création de la sauvegarde native... (Cela prendra un certain temps)</string>
<string name="install_msg_compressing">संपीड़ित (Compress) किया जा रहा है...\n(कृपया बंद न करें)</string>
<string name="install_msg_creating_backup">नेटिव बैकअप बनाया जा रहा है... (इसमें कुछ समय लगेगा)</string>
<string name="install_msg_exporting">%1$s निर्यात किया जा रहा है...</string>
<string name="install_msg_importing">Importation de la sauvegarde... Veuillez patienter.</string>
<string name="install_msg_importing">बैकअप आयात किया जा रहा है... कृपया प्रतीक्षा करें。</string>
<string name="adb_btn_scanning">नेटवर्क स्कैन किया जा रहा है...</string>
<string name="adb_snack_disabling_cp">Paramétrage de la restriction des processus : Désactivée...</string>
<string name="adb_snack_disabling_cp">प्रक्रिया प्रतिबंध सेट किया जा रहा है: अक्षम...</string>
<string name="adb_snack_setting_ppk">फैंटम प्रोसेस किलर सेट किया जा रहा है: 256...</string>
<string name="adb_status_securing">कनेक्शन सुरक्षित किया जा रहा है...</string>
<string name="sync_msg_calculating">Analizando diferencias del sistema...\nEsto puede tomar un par de minutos.</string>
<string name="sync_msg_calculating">Analyse des différences du système...\nCela peut prendre quelques minutes.</string>
<string name="sync_msg_calculating">Анализ различий системы...\nЭто может занять пару минут.</string>
<string name="sync_msg_calculating">सिस्टम अंतरों का विश्लेषण किया जा रहा है...\nइसमें कुछ मिनट लग सकते हैं।</string>
<string name="sync_msg_calculating">Analisando diferenças do sistema...\nIsso pode levar alguns minutos.</string>
<string name="sync_msg_calculating">Analyzing system differences...\nThis may take a couple of minutes.</string>
<string name="log_server_booting_native">Iniciando el entorno IIAB de forma nativa...</string>
<string name="log_server_booting_native">Démarrage de l\'environnement IIAB en mode natif...</string>
<string name="log_server_booting_native">IIAB वातावरण को नेटिव रूप से बूट किया जा रहा है...</string>
<string name="log_server_stopping_gracefully">IIAB वातावरण को सही ढंग से बंद किया जा रहा है...</string>
<string name="sync_msg_arch_compatible">Matériel compatible. Démarrage de la connexion...</string>
<string name="sync_msg_arch_compatible">हार्डवेयर संगत है। कनेक्शन शुरू हो रहा है...</string>

issue.message: The application adaptive icon is missing a monochrome tag
The application adaptive roundIcon is missing a monochrome tag
Buttons in button bars should be borderless; use `style="?android:attr/buttonBarButtonStyle"` (and `?android:attr/buttonBarStyle` on the parent)

Custom view ``TextView`` has `setOnTouchListener` called on it but does not override `performClick`
`onTouch` should call `View#performClick` when a click is detected
issue.errorLine1: public boolean onTouch(View v, MotionEvent event) {

issue.message: Custom view ``TextView`` has `setOnTouchListener` called on it but does not override `performClick`
`onTouch` lambda should call `View#performClick` when a click is detected

String literal in `setText` can not be translated. Use Android resources instead.
String literal in `setText` can not be translated. Use Android resources instead.
String literal in `setText` can not be translated. Use Android resources instead.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
String literal in `setText` can not be translated. Use Android resources instead.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
String literal in `setText` can not be translated. Use Android resources instead.

issue.errorLine1: <TextView android:id="@+id/txt_legend_iiab" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="0.0G" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/dash_text_inverted" android:fontFamily="@font/orbitron" android:layout_alignParentEnd="true" android:layout_centerVertical="true"/>

<TextView android:id="@+id/txt_legend_maps" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="0.0G" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/dash_text_inverted" android:fontFamily="@font/orbitron" android:layout_alignParentEnd="true" android:layout_centerVertical="true"/>

<TextView android:id="@+id/txt_legend_kiwix" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="0.0G" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/dash_text_inverted" android:fontFamily="@font/orbitron" android:layout_alignParentEnd="true" android:layout_centerVertical="true"/>

<TextView android:id="@+id/txt_legend_free" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="0.0G" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/dash_text_inverted" android:fontFamily="@font/orbitron" android:layout_alignParentEnd="true" android:layout_centerVertical="true"/>

Hardcoded string "Toggle Theme", should use `@string` resource
`@id/dash_text_wifi_ip` can overlap `TextView-3` if @id/dash_text_wifi_ip grows due to localized text expansion
`@id/dash_text_hotspot_ip` can overlap `TextView-3` if @id/dash_text_hotspot_ip grows due to localized text expansion
`TextView-3` can overlap `@id/txt_legend_iiab` if @string/install_legend_iiab grows due to localized text expansion

issue.message: When you define `paddingEnd` you should probably also define `paddingStart` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingEnd` you should probably also define `paddingStart` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingStart` you should probably also define `paddingEnd` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingEnd` you should probably also define `paddingStart` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingStart` you should probably also define `paddingEnd` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingEnd` you should probably also define `paddingStart` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingStart` you should probably also define `paddingEnd` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingStart` you should probably also define `paddingEnd` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingEnd` you should probably also define `paddingStart` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingStart` you should probably also define `paddingEnd` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingEnd` you should probably also define `paddingStart` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingStart` you should probably also define `paddingEnd` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingEnd` you should probably also define `paddingStart` for right-to-left symmetry
Consider replacing `android:layout_alignParentLeft` with `android:layout_alignParentStart="true"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:layout_marginLeft` with `android:layout_marginStart="5px"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:layout_marginRight` with `android:layout_marginEnd="20px"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:layout_alignParentRight` with `android:layout_alignParentEnd="true"` to better support right-to-left layouts
